request_text: Create a child issue under epic #1843 for the doctrine-only tiered-standards slice being delivered by mission org-pack-subdir-and-doctrine-qol-01KVSRJ6 (Thread C): a non-orphan tiered-standards styleguide mapped to named src/ areas + one DRG edge + non-orphan test, with CI per-tier gates and agent-effort routing explicitly deferred to the #1843 epic. Keep tracker hygiene clean: link child to #1843, reference the mission.
